payload.claim_text: MTA NYCT conducted a utilization analysis of females and minorities in its workforce as of June 30, 2023, comparing workforce percentages to estimated availability within the relevant labor market
payload.subject: MTA New York City Transit (NYCT)
payload.description: Utilization analysis performed with estimated availability targets for each EEO-4 category

payload.claim_text: NYCT's action strategy to address areas of underutilization includes: forecast future opportunities, identify specific job titles within underutilized EEO categories, meet with the People Department, departmental engagement, meet with Department Heads, create customized strategies, focus on underutilized categories including Computer Specialist, Analysts, Property Protection Agents for females and Assistant Chiefs, Director, Cleaners, Station Agents for minority males
payload.subject: MTA New York City Transit (NYCT)
